title: tariri polyantha
intro: Tariri polyantha, also known as the Mexican tea or yerba de la luna, is a shrub-like plant with small, white flowers and a woody stem, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tariri polyantha include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and burns. Tariri polyantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used to treat a variety of ailments due to its soothing and calming effects.
